_comment: Copy this file to apexlint.config.json and remove the _comment fields.
_comment_rules: Run ONLY these rule IDs. Remove to run all rules.
_comment_excludeRules: Skip these rule IDs (merged with --exclude-rules CLI flag).
_comment_categories: Run only rules in these categories. Remove to run all categories.
_comment_excludePaths: Glob patterns for files to skip. Supports * ** ?
_comment_maxViolationsPerFile: Cap results per file. Useful when onboarding a large codebase.
_comment_metadataRoots: sfdx project roots for SObject metadata (enables UnguardedCrudOperation).
_comment_failOn: Exit code 1 when any violation is at or above this severity.
